page_content:
Total Credits

1 Requirements may vary slightly depending on concentration; please refer to complete list of requirements on http://ensp.umd.edu.

2 To be taken in the junior or senior year

3 Students shall not double-count the Applied Science and Policy requirement with another requirement for their concentration.

GRADING POLICY: Students who entered the Environmental Science and Policy Program (ENSP) in Spring 2002, and thereafter, are required to earn grades of "C-" or higher in all courses taken within the ENSP core, in all required courses, and restricted electives of the selected area of concentration.
